title: pavonia virginica
intro: Pavonia virginica, also known as Rose Mallow or Swamp Rose Mallow, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia virginica include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile option for herbal remedies.
